channel.title: Change Notice on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Change Notice on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Retirement: Azure Load Balancer Inbound NAT rule version 1 for Azure VMSS (aka Inbound NAT Pools)
item.description:
Microsoft narrowed the scope of an Azure Load Balancer retirement notice. The retirement now applies only to Inbound NAT rules version 1 resources for single VMs, not VMSS NAT pools.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: GitHub Copilot code review will start consuming GitHub Actions minutes on June 1, 2026
item.description:
GitHub Copilot code review will begin consuming GitHub Actions minutes starting June 1, 2026. The change applies to code review usage on pull requests.

  • Source: GitHub
